title: Al Forthan Scholarship — prompt list
html:
Bare prompt list + URL for the Al Forthan Scholarship application — Yahir's note-to-self that this is the "most contemplative" application requiring authentic emotion. Companion to the full essay draft at 2023 01 09 YAHIRS Al Forthan Scholarship.
